name: Meatballs in Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/Gas 4. Place all the meatball ingredients (except the oil) in a bowl and combine thoroughly. Divide the mixture into twelve and shape into balls. Leave them to rest for approximately 30 minutes.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large frying pan on the hob. Add the meatballs and cook for 3-5 minutes until lightly browned. Remove the meatballs from the heat and place them in an ovenproof dish.
3. Meanwhile, heat the oil in a frying pan and fry the onion and garlic for 2-3 minutes until softened. Add the peppers and sauté for another 2-3 minutes. Add all the remaining ingredients to the pan and bring to a boil. Season well.
4. Pour the sauce over the meatballs, cover, and cook in the center of the oven for 30 minutes. Serve with rice or pasta and salad.
